creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 209091
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.14.0

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to version 2.14.0.

A complete changelog is available at https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.14.0

The port passes both portlint and poudriere testport.

-David
